text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah, is it that time already? Special Week, I'm heading ——

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Inhale… exhale… All righty! SUZUKA!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Y-Yes?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Is it okay if I go running with you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sure! …Huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty! All done stretching! Let's hurry up and run, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as we're here together, why don't we 
do partner running? Let's treat it like a real race 
and give it our all!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: A race…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, does starting off with a 1 600 meter 
left-handed race sound good? I'll go prepare!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah, o-okay…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay then, then let's do this! Ready, set… GO!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Whoa?! She's already way ahead!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff… huff… huff…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(It's just me on the track. No one else in sight, and all I can hear 
is my feet quietly hitting the ground… My favorite things…)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(Then… what's the point of racing? 
I could just run by myself forever…)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (Why am I… racing?)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: —— Haaaaah!!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka! Coming to Tracen Academy and being 
able to race with you has made me so happy!!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's why… I won't lose! Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah! No way, she passed me…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (No. The lead is… my spot!)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Haaah!!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Suzuka! Well, I'm not finished yet!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(She's not backing down! If I don't keep focused, 
she could turn this around!)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But I won't… I won't give up my lead!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Waaah?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: …Not yet! Not yeeeeet!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff… huff… huff…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Huff… huff… huff…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew… Wow, we really ran a lot!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yeah… We certainly gave it our all.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka? Um, are you okay? It seems like something's wrong.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah… No, I was just… admiring the view.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (How silly of me. What was I so worried about?)

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
First across the finish is Silence Suzuka! 
That's Silence Suzuka, showing us a splendid escape!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Pant… pant… pant…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(Competing with everything I have, pushing my limits 
to make it to the end…)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: This is… the view from the lead!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (Thank you for reminding me… my new friend.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You know, Suzuka, you're craaaaazy fast! 
I'm gonna have to train a lot more! I'm so pumped!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, yeah? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um… Is it all right if I call you Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh… Yeah! Yeah, of course!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You two!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah?! Waah?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What are you doing out at a time like this! It's way past curfew! 
Get back to your dorms now! Move those feet!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Y-Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph. What a handful…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Dear Mom and Mama, student life is way rougher 
than I thought it would be. Everyone's so fast, 
lessons are difficult, and I'm very busy.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But… I have a dream that I intend to make reality.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Because of that, everything is okay! I'm going to do my best, 
together with my friends and classmates!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Someday I'll make my debut, appear in the Twinkle Series… 
and then make my dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll make you both proud!
Love, Special Week.
